race.comment: EXTRAGALACTIC (16) has been electric in her two runs back and now gets her chance in Group company. The draw is sticky but Zac Lloyd takes over and should be able to find the right lanes. Expect her to be bursting through late. INKARUNA (9) pulled up with excuses in the G3 P J Bell when sent out favourite, but her first two runs this prep line up beautifully for this, especially the lip-defeat to Beadman in the Fireball. Happy to forgive. TYCOON STAR (2) has been denied by the barest margin in both runs back and is surely due to get the bob. JMac going on only strengthens the case. LEGACY BOUND (1) was well below his best last time on testing ground after a dynamic fresh win. Freshened with a month between runs and has been kept sharp with a trial. Expecting a bounce-back. THANKS GORGEOUS (10) must be respected after taking care of some of these last start in the LR VRC Sprint Classic at Flemington. Draws well again and is right in the mix.
